review_title: Neuroflash speeds up the writing of texts
description: Neuroflash is suitable for more than 30 text types, e.g.:* Webinar title ideas* SEO-friendly headlines* Headlines and text for ads* Outline and introduction for blog posts* Product descriptions* AIDA Writing MethodIt will become increasingly difficult to distinguish AI copy from hand-crafted copy.However, as well copywriters will use AI, they will be inspired by it and will (be able to) become even better.Basically, an AI, like the one from neuroflash, is primarily intended for marketing texts and for all other types of texts that end up being written to lead to a sale.Thus, a lot of time can be saved especially for this.
author: Torsten S.
pros: The AI itself "speaks" German. Therefore, it is ideal for pre-planning blog articles. But it also works great for SEO.Among other things, neuroflash shows which words should be used in an article so that an article on a certain topic with the appropriate keywords ranks better on Google.With neuroflash you can also create title and meta description that perform well.
cons: Only 8 languages are offered. Moreover, it is a pity that AI images can only be created in English. But it is still in beta version. There is still something to come.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
